card.text_raw_chs:
本回合中每打出过一张技能牌，此牌额外造成{Damage:diff()}点伤害一次。{InCombat:

card.text_default_chs: 本回合中每打出过一张技能牌，此牌额外造成4点伤害一次。
card.text_upgraded_chs: 本回合中每打出过一张技能牌，此牌额外造成6点伤害一次。
card.text_raw_eng:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each Skill already played this turn.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
